Beneath the sleek, aerodynamic exterior lies a thrilling 3.6L 6-Cylinder Turbocharged engine, delivering a remarkable 480 horsepower and seamless all-wheel-drive performance. With a 5-Speed Automatic transmission and Tiptronic S technology, you'll enjoy the perfect balance of effortless power and precise control.

Step inside and you'll be enveloped in a world of luxury and sophistication. The Porsche 911 Turbo boasts a stunning interior, featuring premium leather seating, a premium sound system, and a state-of-the-art navigation system to guide you on your adventures. Bluetooth connectivity and Apple CarPlay/Android Auto integration keep you connected and entertained, while the sunroof and backup camera add to the convenience and versatility of this exceptional vehicle.

With its exceptional performance, timeless design, and unparalleled attention to detail, this 2008 Porsche 911 Turbo is a true masterpiece of automotive engineering. Imagine the thrill of commanding the road, turning heads wherever you go, and experiencing the pure joy of driving a Porsche. This is your chance to own a piece of automotive history and elevate your driving experience to new heights.

Don't miss your opportunity to make this Porsche 911 Turbo your own. Contact us today to schedule a test drive and experience the unrivaled power and elegance of this exceptional sports car. We look forward to helping you discover the true meaning of driving pleasure.

description:
Elevate your driving experience with the 2024 Toyota Sequoia Capstone, a true masterpiece of automotive engineering. This magnificent SUV boasts a striking Red exterior and a meticulously crafted interior that exudes luxury and sophistication.

Tailored to the discerning driver, the Sequoia Capstone comes equipped with a remarkable array of features, including:

- Capstone package
- Navigation System
- Front dual zone A/C
- Remote keyless entry
- Traction control
- ABS brakes
- Power moonroof
- Power Liftgate
- Active Cruise Control
- Automatic Power Extending Running Boards
- Heated & Ventilated Front Seats
- Heated rear seats
- Semi-Aniline Leather Seat Trim
- Alloy wheels

Powered by a robust V6 Hybrid engine and a smooth 10-Speed Automatic transmission, the Sequoia Capstone delivers exceptional performance and efficiency, with an impressive 19 MPG in the city and 22 MPG on the highway. This 4WD powerhouse is designed to conquer any terrain, while providing a comfortable and refined driving experience.

Step inside the Sequoia Capstone and be captivated by the attention to detail. The premium JBL audio system, with 14 speakers, delivers an unparalleled listening experience, while the Heads-Up Display and Navigation System keep you informed and connected on the road. The heated and ventilated front seats, along with the heated rear seats, ensure your passengers enjoy unrivaled comfort.

This exceptional SUV is the embodiment of Toyota's commitment to quality, reliability, and innovation. The Sequoia Capstone is not just a vehicle; it's a statement of sophistication and capability that will elevate your driving experience to new heights.

We invite you to visit our showroom and experience the 2024 Toyota Sequoia Capstone for yourself. Let us demonstrate how this remarkable SUV can transform your daily commute and weekend adventures. We're confident that once you take it for a test drive, you'll be captivated by its unparalleled performance, luxurious amenities, and unwavering attention to detail.

This is reflected in the price you are paying for the vehicle now and why the vehicle is less expensive than a similar one that was not reacquired. description:
Porsche North Houston is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2020 Porsche Panamera Dressed in an elegant White and with 45,705 miles to its name, this vehicle is a testament to the potent combination of performance, luxury, and everyday usability that Porsche embodies.

The Panamera stands as a beacon of executive design and dynamic capability, its White exterior not just a color, but a statement of timeless sophistication. Adorned with 21 SportDesign Wheels and LED Headlights including Porsche Dynamic Light System (PDLS), it presents a commanding yet refined presence. Door Handle Inlays Painted in Exterior Color and Wheel Center Caps with Colored Porsche Crest enhance its cohesive and distinguished aesthetic, while Soft Close Doors add an extra layer of premium craftsmanship.

Step inside and the Leather Interior in Black/Bordeaux Red greets you, exuding an air of luxury that only Porsche can deliver. The 14-Way Power Seats with Memory Package ensure tailored comfort, while Seat Heating (Front and Rear) and Front Seat Ventilation provide year-round refinement. The Porsche Crest on Headrests (Front and Rear), Ambient Lighting, and Heated Steering Wheel elevate the cabin with bespoke detail. A BOSE Surround Sound System and 4-Zone Climate Control ensure every passenger enjoys first-class accommodations.

Engine and Performance: At the heart of this refined sports sedan lies a turbocharged 3.0-liter V6 engine, producing an impressive 330 horsepower and 331 lb-ft of torque. Paired with Porsches renowned 8-speed PDK (Automatic) transmission, the Panamera delivers seamless shifts and exhilarating acceleration. Power Steering Plus enhances low-speed maneuverability without compromising high-speed stability, while Lane Change Assist (LCA) and Surround View provide added confidence behind the wheel.

Key Features:

Premium Package Plus: Elevates comfort and convenience with 14-Way Power Seats with Memory, Front & Rear Seat Heating, Front Seat Ventilation, BOSE Surround Sound, LED Headlights with PDLS, Lane Change Assist, and Comfort Access.

21 SportDesign Wheels: Bold and athletic styling that complements the Panameras performance-oriented stance.

Soft Close Doors: Enhances refinement with effortless and secure door operation.

4-Zone Climate Control: Individualized comfort settings for all passengers.

Ambient Lighting: Creates a customizable and sophisticated cabin atmosphere.

Surround View: Advanced camera system providing enhanced visibility and confidence when maneuvering.

This 2020 Porsche Panamera is far more than just a car; it is the embodiment of the brand's commitment to peak automotive engineering and opulent design. Available at Porsche North Houston, this vehicle offers an invitation to experience the thrill of a luxury sports sedan that seamlessly blends performance and prestige.



Porsche North Houston is a member of the indiGO Auto Group and has received the highly coveted Porsche Premier Dealer status. Our dealership features a beautiful Porsche Corporate Identity showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detailing department, and Porsche accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade-in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email Porsche North Houston using the form on this page
, or drop by our location at 13911 North Freeway (I-45N) on the northside of Houston. We invite you to Activate Your Ownership with us today!

description:
The 2020 Mercedes-Benz AMG GT 53 4-Door Coupe is a stunning masterpiece of engineering and design, coated in a sophisticated designo Diamond White exterior that seamlessly exudes an aura of luxury and sophistication. This elegant hue perfectly complements the sleek and aerodynamic lines of the vehicle, enhancing its commanding road presence. Step inside, and you'll be embraced by an interior that strikes a perfect balance between opulence and sportiness, featuring Red Pepper/Black exclusive Nappa leather upholstery that adds a vibrant pop of color and a sense of luxury to every journey.Under the hood, the AMG GT 53 is powered by a robust 3.0L 6-cylinder engine, which offers exhilarating performance and unparalleled driving dynamics. Equipped with an All-Wheel Drive drivetrain, this coupe delivers outstanding traction and stability, ensuring confidence in various driving conditions. The AMG performance exhaust system provides a symphony of sounds that reflect the car's powerhouse capabilities, while the AMG carbon fiber trim across the interior underscores its sporty and progressive character.Adding to the car s appeal is the driver assistance package, designed to make each drive as convenient as it is pleasurable. A fixed panorama roof invites an abundance of natural light into the cabin, creating an open and airy ambiance that enhances comfort for every passenger. Overall, the 2020 Mercedes-Benz AMG GT 53 4-Door Coupe is more than just a car it s an experience of speed, luxury, and state-of-the-art technology, harmoniously rolled into one exceptional vehicle.

What this vehicle includes:Convenience With the adaptive cruise control activated, the vehicle will use cameras and/or navigation data to automatically slow down for curves in the road ahead that may be too sharp for the current set speed. description:
Experience the power and capability of the 2021 Ram 2500 Big Horn. This rugged and versatile pickup is engineered to handle any task with confidence. Equipped with the renowned Cummins 6.7L I6 Turbodiesel engine, the Big Horn delivers exceptional towing and hauling performance, making it the perfect choice for your work or recreational needs.

- 6.7L I-6 Diesel Turbocharged (Cummins)
- Level 2 Equipment Group
- Sport Appearance Package
- Radio: Uconnect 4 with 8.4 Display
- Air Conditioning ATC with Dual Zone Control
- Rear Power Sliding Window
- Security Alarm
- Universal Garage Door Opener
- Front and Rear Performance Tuned Shock Absorbers
- Painted Front and Rear Bumpers
- Remote Start System
- Hill Descent Control

This Big Horn model is further enhanced with the Off Road Package, providing you with advanced off-road capabilities. Featuring front and rear performance-tuned shock absorbers, an off-road decal, and hill descent control, this truck is ready to tackle any terrain with ease. The Sport Appearance Package adds a touch of style with a body-color grille surround, black interior accents, and a sporty decal.

Step inside the Big Horn and you'll be greeted by a wealth of premium features. The Uconnect 4 system with an 8.4 touchscreen display puts seamless connectivity at your fingertips, allowing you to stay connected on the go. Dual-zone automatic climate control ensures everyone onboard enjoys their ideal comfort level. The heated steering wheel and front seats provide a cozy and comfortable driving experience, even in the coldest conditions.

Versatility is at the heart of the Big Horn. The 60/40 split-folding rear seat and in-floor storage bins offer ample flexibility to accommodate your cargo needs. The LED bed lighting and dampened tailgate further enhance the utility of this capable truck.

Safety is also a top priority, with features like blind spot monitoring, cross-path detection, and the ParkSense front and rear park assist system keeping you and your passengers secure.

Discover the uncompromising performance, innovative technology, and exceptional versatility of the 2021 Ram 2500 Big Horn. Experience the confidence and capability that this truck delivers, and let it elevate your driving experience. Visit our showroom today to take this impressive machine for a test drive.

description:
Discover the rugged and capable 2022 Ram 1500 Rebel, a true workhorse that blends power, technology, and style. This remarkable truck is the perfect companion for your next adventure, whether it's conquering the off-road or tackling your daily commute.

Boasting a HEMI 5.7L V8 engine with eTorque, the 2022 Ram 1500 Rebel delivers exceptional performance and efficiency. With 4-wheel drive and a robust 8-speed automatic transmission, this truck is ready to take on any terrain with confidence. Standout features include:

- Google Android Auto and Apple CarPlay
- SiriusXM Satellite Radio
- Heated front seats and steering wheel
- Power adjustable pedals
- 4G LTE Wi-Fi hotspot
- Rear window defroster
- Universal garage door opener
- Auto-dimming exterior driver's mirror

The 2022 Ram 1500 Rebel's rugged good looks are enhanced by its Granite Crystal Metallic Clearcoat exterior and bold Rebel styling cues. Step inside and you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed cabin, featuring premium cloth and vinyl upholstery, a full-length upgraded floor console, and a host of advanced technology features to keep you connected and entertained.

Whether you're hauling heavy loads, towing your toys, or simply enjoying the open road, the 2022 Ram 1500 Rebel is up for the challenge. With its impressive capability, advanced technology, and distinctive style, this truck is a true standout in the segment.

We invite you to experience the power and versatility of the 2022 Ram 1500 Rebel for yourself. Visit our showroom today and let our knowledgeable team help you discover how this exceptional truck can enhance your driving experience. We're confident you'll be impressed by its uncompromising performance and refined, feature-rich design.

description:
Discover the power and sophistication of the 2023 Dodge Durango R/T Plus. This dynamic SUV is the perfect blend of performance, technology, and comfort, making it the ideal choice for the discerning driver.

Boasting a one-owner history and a clean vehicle record, this Durango R/T Plus comes equipped with an impressive array of features. Highlights include:

. One Owner
. Clean Vehicle History
. QUICK ORDER PACKAGE 22T R/T PLUS
. Navigation system: TomTom
. Heated Second Row Seats
. Power driver seat
. Power Sunroof
. Power Liftgate
. Auto High-beam Headlights
. Adaptive Cruise Control w/Stop
. Auto-Dimming Exterior Driver Mirror
. Premium LED Fog Lamps
. 115V Auxiliary Power Outlet
. Apple CarPlay/Android Auto
. Dual Remote USB Port - Charge Only
. Full Speed Forward Collision Warning Plus
. LED Auxiliary Low Beam & Turn Signal
. Power Tilt & Telescopic Steering Column
. Red Accent Stitching
. Leather Trimmed Bucket Seats
. Power 8-Way Driver Memory 8-Way Passenger Seats
. Ventilated Front Seats
. Class IV Receiver Hitch

Powered by the legendary HEMI 5.7L V8 engine, this Durango R/T Plus delivers an exhilarating driving experience with its 8-speed automatic transmission and all-wheel-drive capabilities. Enjoy impressive fuel efficiency with an EPA-estimated 14 city/22 highway MPG.

The exterior of this Durango R/T Plus is adorned in a striking Destroyer Gray Clearcoat, complemented by the bold R/T styling cues. Step inside and you'll be surrounded by premium leather-trimmed seating, a state-of-the-art infotainment system, and a host of advanced safety features to keep you and your loved ones secure.

Whether you're embarking on a family adventure or seeking a commanding presence on the road, the 2023 Dodge Durango R/T Plus is the perfect SUV to meet your needs. Experience the perfect blend of power, technology, and luxury today.

We utilize Market Based Pricing for all pre-owned vehicles on our lot. This ensures you have the most competitive price in the market based on mileage, equipment, and features. Utilizing this approach, our prices may fluctuate during the day on our website and may not match what is currently on 3rd party sites as they only update every 24 hours. The Suntrup family have been servicing and selling cars since 1957 for the St Louis area.The Suntrup Automotive Group is active in its communities and believes in giving back. Today Suntrup Automotive Group has nine brands, eleven locations, thousands of cars and is every bit committed to providing excellent customer service in every aspect of the business. There's never been a better time to drop on by at our dealership here in 5926 So Lindbergh Blvd St Louis, Missouri, proudly serving drivers from Ballwin, Affton and Kirkwood. We're very much looking forward to it.

description:
Elevate your driving experience with this stunning 2022 Dodge Charger R/T. This powerful muscle car combines bold style, exceptional performance, and an impressive array of premium features that will captivate any driving enthusiast.

- Blacktop Package
- PLUS GROUP
- Media Hub (2 USB, AUX)
- Heated 2nd Row Seats
- Power Front Driver/Passenger Seats
- Emergency communication system: SiriusXM Guardian
- Blind Spot & Cross Path Detection
- ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera
- Fully automatic headlights
- Deluxe Security Alarm
- Bi-Function HID Projector Head Lamps
- Black 1-Piece Performance Spoiler
- Black Dodge Grille Badge
- Blacktop R/T Badge

Beneath the sculpted hood, you'll find the legendary HEMI 5.7L V8 engine, delivering an exhilarating 370 horsepower and 395 lb-ft of torque. Paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and rear-wheel drive, this Charger R/T provides an unforgettable driving experience, with a thrilling blend of power and precision.

The exterior of this Charger commands attention with its bold Blue paint and striking Blacktop styling cues, including the black performance spoiler, grille badge, and 20-inch black noise painted wheels. Step inside and you'll be greeted by a premium cabin featuring Nappa/Alcantara performance seats, a heated steering wheel, and a wealth of advanced technology, including Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, and the Uconnect 4C infotainment system with an 8.4-inch display.

Safety and convenience are also prioritized, with features like Blind Spot and Cross Path Detection, a ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera, and a Deluxe Security Alarm, ensuring you can navigate the road with confidence and peace of mind.

We utilize Market Based Pricing for all pre-owned vehicles on our lot. This ensures you have the most competitive price in the market based on mileage, equipment, and features. Utilizing this approach, our prices may fluctuate during the day on our website and may not match what is currently on 3rd party sites as they only update every 24 hours. The Suntrup family have been servicing and selling cars since 1957 for the St Louis area.The Suntrup Automotive Group is active in its communities and believes in giving back. Today Suntrup Automotive Group has nine brands, eleven locations, thousands of cars and is every bit committed to providing excellent customer service in every aspect of the business. There's never been a better time to drop on by at our dealership here in 5926 So Lindbergh Blvd St Louis, Missouri, proudly serving drivers from Ballwin, Affton and Kirkwood. We're very much looking forward to it.

description:
GR Auto Gallery is excited to present this brutally built 2001 Chevrolet Camaro SS finished in deep Navy Blue Metallic over a Black leather interior. This is a true SS car that blends factory muscle with serious aftermarket performance. The newer paint gives it a clean, glossy finish that highlights the aggressive body lines of the fourth generation F-body, while the glass T-tops add that open air experience that makes these cars so enjoyable in the summer months.

Under the hood is where this Camaro truly separates itself. Power comes from the legendary 5.7L V8, now force fed by a ProCharger F-1A94 twin intercooled setup pushing output north of 600 horsepower. It is tuned to run on premium pump gas or E85, offering flexibility depending on how you want to drive it. The engine is backed by a Tremec Magnum 6-speed manual transmission paired with a McLeod twin disc clutch, delivering serious strength and crisp engagement. Out back, a Ford 9 inch rear end with 3.54 gears and positraction ensures the power gets to the ground reliably.

The supporting modifications are equally impressive. Frame connectors stiffen the chassis, while aftermarket suspension upgrades, adjustable coilovers, and Koni 3 way adjustable rear shocks help keep the car planted under hard acceleration and spirited driving. This is a thoughtfully built setup designed to handle real power, not just make big numbers on paper. A Hurst shifter adds to the driver focused feel and gives each gear change a precise, mechanical connection.

Inside, the cabin maintains a comfortable and functional layout with power seats, power windows, locks, and mirrors, along with working air conditioning and heat. A Kenwood stereo with screen brings modern audio and connectivity into the mix without taking away from the car's performance oriented personality. With its combination of documented SS heritage, extensive performance upgrades, and street friendly versatility, this Camaro offers supercar level punch in a classic American muscle package.

Please call or email us today for more information.

description:
This 2023 KIA Sorento SX AWD is currently for sale at Elgin Hyundai, a proud member of the Bob Loquercio Auto Group. Located at 1215 W Lake Street in Bartlett, IL, our dealership is dedicated to serving the Elgin, Schaumburg, and greater Chicagoland communities with a commitment to providing extraordinary, personalized customer service. As part of a family-run company that has grown into one of the largest and most trusted auto groups in the Midwest, we prioritize your comfort and confidence throughout the entire buying process.

No accidents or damage reported

1-Owner vehicle

Athletic Performance and AWD Capability
Finished in a sophisticated Ebony Black exterior with a refined Black interior, this Sorento SX is engineered for both power and precision:

Turbocharged Power: It is powered by a 2.5L Turbo GDI MPI DOHC 4-Cylinder engine featuring idle stop and go technology.

Seamless Shifting: The powertrain is mated to a high-performance 8-speed DCT transmission with driver-selectable modes.

All-Weather Traction: Equipped with an All-Wheel Drive (AWD) system and a Brake Actuated Limited Slip Differential for enhanced stability in all road conditions.

Mechanical Refinement: Features a strut front suspension, multi-link rear suspension, and electric parking brake.

Efficiency: Delivers an EPA-estimated 22 City / 27 Highway MPG.

Bespoke Interior and Digital Integration
The SX trim offers a masterclass in modern comfort, featuring high-end standard equipment and sophisticated technology:

Luxury Seating: Features heated front bucket seats trimmed in durable Syntex artificial leather with an 8-way power driver seat.

Advanced Navigation: Anchored by an integrated navigation system with voice activation and a SiriusXM Traffic real-time display.

Digital Cockpit: The cabin includes 2 LCD monitors in the front and a Kia Connect Tracker System

You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. description:
Elevate your driving experience with the exceptional 2025 Honda Civic Sport. This meticulously crafted vehicle is a testament to Honda's commitment to engineering excellence and a true embodiment of the brand's renowned reliability and performance.

Boasting a dynamic array of features, the 2025 Civic Sport sets itself apart from the competition. Key highlights include:

- SPORT trim level
- Blind Spot Information System
- Collision Mitigation Braking System
- Rear Cross Traffic Monitor

The Civic Sport's impressive fuel efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 31 mpg in the city and 39 mpg on the highway, makes it an ideal choice for the modern commuter. Powered by a 2.0L I4 DOHC 16V engine and equipped with a smooth-shifting CVT transmission, this Civic delivers a dynamic and responsive driving experience.

Stepping inside, you'll be greeted by a well-appointed cabin that seamlessly blends style and functionality. Enjoy the convenience of features like automatic climate control, a premium audio system, and a user-friendly infotainment display with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration. The Civic Sport's spacious interior and versatile cargo area provide ample room for your everyday adventures.

Safety is of the utmost importance, and the 2025 Civic Sport delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Features like Adaptive Cruise Control, Blind Spot Information System, and the Collision Mitigation Braking System work tirelessly to keep you and your passengers secure on the road.

Elevate your driving experience and make a statement with the 2025 Honda Civic Sport. This exceptional vehicle offers a winning combination of style, performance, and cutting-edge technology. Visit our showroom today to experience the Civic Sport firsthand and discover why it's the perfect choice for your next vehicle.

*Summary*
Welcome to Swope Nissan.

*Vehicle Details*
2002 Dodge Ram 2500 Pickup ? Rugged reliability meets unbeatable value in this classic workhorse located in Elizabethtown, KY. Powered by a stout 6-cylinder, 5.9L diesel engine and rear-wheel drive, this Ram 2500 Base delivers dependable low-end torque for towing, hauling, and heavy-duty tasks while offering long-lasting diesel efficiency. The vehicle comes with a CARFAX Clean Report, providing added confidence in its documented history.

This 2002 Dodge Ram 2500 stands out for its functional simplicity and mechanical soundness. The durable diesel powerplant is known for longevity when maintained, making this truck a smart choice for contractors, small business owners, or anyone needing a dependable pickup that won't break the bank. The straightforward Base trim focuses on utility?sturdy bed, strong frame, and classic Ram styling?so you get performance where it matters most.

Located in Elizabethtown, KY, this Ram 2500 is competitively priced and clearly marked as the best price in the region for comparable diesel pickups. Whether you're hauling equipment, towing trailers, or looking for a rugged daily driver, this truck offers the reliability and capability of a diesel Ram without the premium price tag. Schedule a test drive today and experience the proven durability and work-ready performance of this 2002 Dodge Ram 2500 ? a top-value diesel pickup in Elizabethtown, Kentucky.

*Equipment*
The spacious cab of this three-quarter ton offers many convenience and technology options. It is also ready for your burliest jobs. Our dealership has already run the CARFAX report and it is clean. A clean CARFAX is a great asset for resale value in the future. With a diesel engine you will be pleased with the power, torque, and fuel efficiency gains. This model has a 6 Cyl, 5.9L high output engine. Enjoy the incredible handling with the rear wheel drive on the vehicle. The vehicle embodies class and sophistication with its refined white exterior. It has custom accessories that are not standard on the original model. The camper shell on this truck not only looks great, but will protect your gear from weather elements and thieves. This vehicle has plenty of clearance. The grille guard will protect your front end from uninvited collisions. The vehicle has been lifted. The long bed is perfect for professional tradesmen and outdoorsmen to haul all their equipment. This unit is equipped with a class leading off-road package. This vehicle has large off-roading tires designed for grip and durability. It?s running boards makes entering and exiting the vehicle far more comfortable. This is a short bed truck. The engine and chassis of this 3/4 ton pickup has been designed for towing. The front end is aligned to prevent tire wear. The pads and rotors on all four brakes are within factory specification. The high torque clutch has exceptional grip and is rated for thousands of more miles. The exhaust system was inspected by our service team and was given a perfect rating. If muscle is what you are after, you will be more than satisfied with this this 3/4 ton pickup. The engine has a lot of low end torque for your toughest towing and hauling needs. The entire mechanical system is sound and reliable. The powertrain is very reliable. This vehicle has completed all scheduled maintenance. Our service department inspected the transmission to ensure there is no slippage. The engine has been tuned up for optimal performance. The large turbo on this engine boosts horsepower by forcing more air into the cylinders.

description: You can find this 2010 Subaru Forester 2.5X and many others like it at Cook Chevrolet. This versatile SUV is perfect for families or contractors with its oversized cargo area, exceptional horsepower and option upgrades. This Subaru Forester 2.5X comes equipped with all wheel drive, which means no limitations as to how or where you can drive. Different terrains and varying weather conditions will have little effect as to how this vehicle performs.You can tell this 2010 Subaru Forester has been pampered by the fact that it has less than 85,279mi and appears with a showroom shine.More information about the 2010 Subaru Forester:From its debut in 1998 through its redesigns in 2003 and 2009, the 2010 Subaru Forester is now considered a crossover vehicle (not just a wagon or mini-SUV). It is roomier, more nimble and has more standard safety features than 2009. It competes with the Honda CR-V and Toyota RAV4. There is up to 68 cu. ft. of interior cargo room. Mileage for the base 2.5 X trim is estimated at 20 mpg city and 26 mpg highway.Strengths of this model include numerous standard safety features;, sporty yet dependable handling, generous interior space, and Full-time all-wheel drive

description: Get ready for pure driving excitement in this 2010 Volkswagen GTI 4dr HB DSG, now available at Audi Central Houston. Iconic, turbocharged, and endlessly fun, the GTI is a true hot hatch that blends everyday practicality with pulse-raising performance.Powered by a responsive turbocharged engine paired with a lightning-quick DSG automatic transmission, the 2010 Volkswagen GTI delivers sharp acceleration and smooth, rapid gear changes. Its sport-tuned suspension and precise steering create an engaging driving experience that makes every Houston commute feel like a back-road adventure. Agile handling and confident braking give you total control behind the wheel.The exterior design reflects classic GTI heritage with bold styling, a distinctive grille, and an athletic hatchback profile. Inside, the cabin offers a driver-focused layout with supportive sport seating, intuitive controls, and premium touches throughout. The four-door configuration provides practicality and versatility, while the spacious hatchback cargo area adds everyday usability.Technology and convenience features enhance the experience with an easy-to-use infotainment system, Bluetooth connectivity, and climate control designed for comfort in all seasons. The GTI is known for delivering European-inspired performance combined with impressive reliability and value.If you are searching for a sporty hatchback in Houston that delivers turbocharged performance, practicality, and unmistakable personality, this 2010 Volkswagen GTI DSG is ready to thrill.At Audi Central Houston, it's not just our offices, customer lounges and parts and service facilities that are high tech. Equally forward-thinking is the professional, informative and friendly way we do business. With our client-centric approach, we pride ourselves in providing drivers with an entirely new way to shop for, maintain, and embrace the Audi luxury-performance tradition. Multi-year winning recipient of Audi's prestigious Magna Society Award for incredible customer service!! Come see what makes us great!

The 2020 Ford Mustang Shelby GT500 Fastback in the striking Grabber Lime exterior color is a masterpiece of engineering and design. With its distinctive vinyl over-the-top racing stripe and painted black roof, this car effortlessly stands out on the road, making a bold statement with its exhilarating aesthetics. Under the hood, a formidable 5.2L V8 engine roars to life, delivering unparalleled power and performance that satisfy even the most discerning driving enthusiast.Step inside the cabin, and you'll be greeted by an Ebony interior with Smoke Gray accents, exuding both luxury and sportiness. The comfort features include heated seats, multi-zone climate control, and a host of advanced technology, with the technology package ensuring seamless integration with modern lifestyle demands. From the blind spot monitor and backup camera to the state-of-the-art navigation, every drive in the GT500 Fastback is as safe as it is thrilling.Performance-enhancing features such as the suspension and handling packages complement the driving experience, ensuring precise control and agility at high speeds. The exposed carbon fiber instrument panel adds to the interior's premium feel, while the inclusion of telematics and remote start further elevate convenience and connectivity. This iconic vehicle truly embodies the legacy of the Mustang, bringing together power, luxury, and cutting-edge technology for an unforgettable driving experience.

2019 Ford F-550 Super Duty Fully Equipped Service Truck



VIN: 1FD0X5HT0KEE29566



If you're looking for a powerful, work-ready service truck that's fully equipped and ready to earn from day one, this 2019 Ford F-550 Super Duty is it.



Truck Details:

Year: 2019

Make/Model: Ford F-550 Super Duty

Cab: 4-Door Extended Cab / Chassis

Engine: 6.7L V8 Power Stroke Turbo Diesel (OHV 32V)

Drivetrain: Rear Wheel Drive with 4x4

Ownership: 1 Owner

Fuel: Diesel



This F-550 delivers serious power and reliability with the proven 6.7L Power Stroke diesel engine. Built to handle heavy-duty jobs, towing, and daily commercial use with ease.



Fully Equipped Service Body:



This truck comes completely outfitted for field service, construction, welding, mechanical work, and more:

6,000 lb Auto Crane Ideal for lifting heavy equipment and materials safely and efficiently

Miller Bobcat 250 Welder/Generator Reliable, jobsite-ready power and welding capability

Boss Air Compressor Built-in air supply for tools and field repairs

Fiberglass Utility Box Durable, lightweight, rust-resistant with ample storage compartments



Everything is professionally mounted and ready to go to work.







Per fect For:

Mobile mechanics

Heavy equipment service

Construction crews

Oilfield service

Welding and fabrication

Fleet expansion



This is a turnkey work truck no need to upfit or invest additional money. It's ready to generate income immediately.







If you're serious about adding a dependable, fully outfitted service truck to your business, this 2019 F-550 Super Duty is a strong, reliable choice.

Un leash the power of pure adrenaline with this exceptional 2019 Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat. This stunning muscle car is a true testament to Dodge's commitment to performance and innovation, delivering an unparalleled driving experience that will leave you craving the open road.

- No Accidents or Damage Reported to CarFax
- Personal Vehicle as reported to CarFax
- QUICK ORDER PACKAGE 27Z SRT HELLCAT REDEYE
- WIDEBODY PACKAGE
- PAINTED BLACK SATIN GRAPHICS PACKAGE
- POWER SUNROOF
- ALCANTARA APPEARANCE PACKAGE
- PLUS PACKAGE
- HARMAN/KARDON AUDIO GROUP W/SUBWOOFER
- TECHNOLOGY GROUP
- DRIVER CONVENIENCE GROUP
- UCONNECT 4C NAV W/8.4 DISPLAY
- SRT PERFORMANCE SPOILER
- TIRES: 305/35ZR20 P ZERO SUMMER
- BLACK BRAKE CALIPERS

Beneath the bold and distinctive exterior lies the heart of a true performance machine. Powered by a 6.2L 8-cylinder SMPI Supercharged OHV engine, this Challenger SRT Hellcat delivers an astounding 707 horsepower and 650 lb-ft of torque, allowing you to conquer the road with unparalleled authority. The 8-speed automatic transmission seamlessly channels this immense power to the rear wheels, providing a thrilling and responsive driving experience that will leave you in awe.

Elevate your driving experience with the Widebody Package, which includes a specially tuned suspension, wider fender flares, and 20-inch Devil's Rim aluminum wheels wrapped in high-performance tires. This package not only enhances the Challenger's already impressive handling, but also gives it a bold, aggressive stance that commands attention wherever you go.

Step inside and you'll be surrounded by a wealth of premium features that cater to your every need. The Alcantara Appearance Package adds a touch of sophistication with the Wildwheel Alcantara steering wheel, while the Plus Package includes a power tilt/telescoping steering column and dark engine turn interior accents for a refined, performance-oriented aesthetic.

Indulge in the immersive audio experience provided by the Harman/Kardon Audio Group, featuring an 18-speaker premium sound system with a trunk-mounted subwoofer and surround sound. Stay connected and entertained with the Uconnect 4C Nav system, which offers an 8.4-inch touchscreen display, GPS navigation, and seamless integration with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto.

Safety and convenience are also at the forefront, with features like Blind Spot and Cross Path Detection, High-Intensity Discharge Headlamps, and the Technology Group's advanced driver-assist technologies, including Auto High Beam Headlamp Control and Adaptive Speed Control.

This 2019 Dodge Challenger SRT Hellcat is a true performance icon, blending raw power, stunning design, and premium amenities to create a driving experience that is simply unmatched. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate the true capabilities of this exceptional muscle car. We're confident that once you take it for a test drive, you'll be captivated by its unrivaled performance and won't be able to resist adding it to your garage.

description: Check out this rugged gray 2022 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT Crew Cab 4x4! Powered by the legendary EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine paired with a smooth 10-speed automatic, it's ready for work or play. Equipped with the Z71 Off-Road Package, this truck features skid plates, all-terrain tires, Chevytec spray-on bed liner, and an integrated trailer brake controller for superior off-road and towing capability. Enjoy comfort and technology with heated front seats, a heated steering wheel, 13.4-inch touchscreen with wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, Google built-in infotainment, and remote start. The power tailgate, bed protection package, and rearview camera add convenience, while safety features like lane keeping assist, front automatic emergency braking, and pedestrian detection provide peace of mind. The Silverado's crew cab delivers spacious seating and clever storage, making it ideal for family, job site, or adventure. Don't miss your chance to own this well-equipped, ready-for-anything Silverado-schedule your test drive today!

description:
Discover the captivating 2024 Hyundai Palisade Limited, a true masterpiece of engineering and design. This stunning SUV, finished in a vibrant Red exterior, is a testament to Hyundai's commitment to crafting vehicles that exceed expectations.

Boasting an impressive list of premium features, the Palisade Limited is the embodiment of luxury and capability. Highlights include:

Clean CarFax
One Owner CarFax
Leather
Heated and Cooled Seats
Bluetooth
Navigation
Back up Camera
Heated Seats
Brakes Plus

The Palisade's powerful V6 engine, paired with an 8-Speed Automatic with SHIFTRONIC transmission and Front-Wheel Drive, delivers an exceptional driving experience with an impressive fuel efficiency of 19 city/26 highway MPG.

Step inside the Palisade Limited and be enveloped in a world of comfort and convenience. The spacious and well-appointed cabin features a Heads-Up Display, 12-Speaker harman/kardon® Audio System, and a Panoramic Sunroof, creating an unparalleled sensory experience. The heated and ventilated front seats, along with the heated rear seats, ensure that every passenger enjoys a truly indulgent journey.

Safety is of the utmost importance, and the Palisade Limited is equipped with an array of advanced safety features, including Blind Spot Monitoring, Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, and a Surround View Monitor, providing you and your loved ones with the peace of mind you deserve.

Whether you're embarking on a family adventure or seeking a sophisticated daily driver, the 2024 Hyundai Palisade Limited is the perfect choice. With its exceptional performance, cutting-edge technology, and uncompromising attention to detail, this SUV is poised to exceed your expectations.

We invite you to experience the Palisade Limited for yourself. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this remarkable vehicle can enhance your driving experience. We're confident that once you take it for a test drive, you'll be captivated by its unrivaled blend of style, comfort, and capability.

1. Lower Starting Price

The GLB 250 FWD is the most affordable way to get into a Mercedes SUV, with base pricing significantly lower than AWD or AMG trims.

2. Better Fuel Economy

Front-wheel drive tends to return slightly better EPA-rated fuel economy than the AWD version. For example, about 25 mpg city / 33 mpg highway on the FWD GLB 250.

This improves day-to-day efficiency and reduces fuel costs over time.

3. Adequate Performance

The 2.0-liter turbocharged four-cylinder engine delivers 221 hp and 258 lb-ft of torque, giving respectable performance for its class (around 6.9 seconds 060 mph).

Its peppy enough for highway merging and city driving without feeling underpowered.

4. Spacious, Practical Interior

The upright, boxy design maximizes usable space: strong legroom and headroom, and a cargo area expanding up to ~62 cu ft with the rear seats folded.

Some competitors with similar exterior footprints offer noticeably less cargo room.

5. Modern Technology & Connectivity

Standard dual 10.25-inch displays, wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and Mercedes-Benzs updated infotainment system enhance convenience and connectivity.

Elevate your driving experience with the 2022 Honda Pilot Special Edition, a versatile and well-equipped SUV that's ready to take on any adventure. This stunning black beauty boasts a powerful 3.5L V6 engine, paired with a smooth 9-speed automatic transmission and all-wheel drive, delivering exceptional performance and capability.

- Custom Features: Power Liftgate, Blind Spot Information (BSI) System warning, Auto High-beam Headlights
- Package Features: 7 Speakers, AM/FM radio: SiriusXM, Air Conditioning, Automatic temperature control, Power driver seat, Power windows, Remote keyless entry, 4-Wheel Disc Brakes, ABS brakes, Forward collision: Collision Mitigation Braking System (CMBS) + FCW mitigation, Lane departure: Lane Keeping Assist System (LKAS) active, Exterior Parking Camera Rear
- Starred Features: Heated Front Bucket Seats, Leather Seat Trim, Power passenger seat, Reclining 3rd row seat
- Checked Features: Traction control, Electronic Stability Control, Panic alarm, Security system, Speed control, Heated door mirrors, Power door mirrors, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, Illuminated entry, Telescoping steering wheel, Tilt steering wheel

Step inside the spacious and well-appointed cabin, where premium amenities and advanced technologies come together to create a truly exceptional driving experience. From the luxurious leather-trimmed seats to the powerful audio system and seamless smartphone integration, every detail has been carefully crafted to ensure your complete satisfaction.

The Honda Pilot's impressive capabilities extend beyond the road, with a versatile cargo area and a range of smart storage solutions that make it the perfect companion for your active lifestyle. Whether you're embarking on a family road trip, hauling gear for your weekend adventures, or navigating the daily commute, this SUV is ready to handle it all with ease.

Safety is also a top priority, with a suite of advanced driver-assistance features that provide added peace of mind. From the Collision Mitigation Braking System to the Lane Keeping Assist System, the Pilot is equipped to help you stay safe and in control, no matter the driving conditions.

description:
Unleash the raw power of the 2022 Dodge Challenger R/T and experience the thrill of driving a true American muscle car. With its iconic design, thunderous HEMI 5.7L V8 engine, and a host of premium features, this Challenger is a force to be reckoned with on the road.

- Blacktop Package
- Driver Convenience Group
- Performance Handling Group
- Plus Package
- 276 Watt Amplifier
- 6 Premium Alpine Speakers
- Radio: Uconnect 4C w/8.4 Display
- SiriusXM Satellite Radio
- Automatic temperature control
- Power driver seat
- Steering wheel mounted audio controls
- 4-Wheel Disc Brakes
- ABS brakes
- Electronic Stability Control
- ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera

Slip behind the wheel and feel the adrenaline rush as you unleash the power of the HEMI engine, paired with the precise handling of the Tremec 6-speed manual transmission. The Challenger's aggressive stance and bold styling turn heads wherever you go, while the premium interior appointments ensure a comfortable and connected driving experience.

The Blacktop Package adds a sinister touch with a gloss black grille, black fuel filler door, and satin black Dodge badging, creating a truly menacing presence. The Performance Handling Group takes the Challenger's capabilities to the next level, with Brembo brakes, high-performance suspension, and a flat-bottom steering wheel for enhanced control.

Step inside and you'll be greeted by the Uconnect 4C system with an 8.4-inch touchscreen display, providing seamless integration of your smartphone's features through Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. The premium-stitched dash panel and ambient lighting create a refined and modern atmosphere, while the Houndstooth cloth performance seats offer exceptional comfort and support.

Whether you're carving through winding roads or cruising down the highway, the 2022 Dodge Challenger R/T is the ultimate expression of American muscle. Combine its raw power, striking good looks, and premium features, and you have a vehicle that's sure to captivate and thrill. Experience the legend for yourself schedule a test drive today and let the Challenger R/T unleash its true potential.

description:
Discover the 2024 Jeep Wrangler Sport S, a rugged and capable off-road icon that's ready to take you on your next adventure. With its striking white/off-white exterior, this Wrangler Sport S is a head-turner that commands attention wherever it goes.

Under the hood, you'll find a powerful 2.0L I4 DOHC engine mated to an 8-speed automatic transmission, providing the perfect blend of performance and efficiency. With its 4-wheel drive system, this Wrangler is ready to tackle any terrain, whether you're navigating the urban jungle or exploring the great outdoors.

- Quick Order Package 22S Sport S
- 8-Speed Automatic (850RE) with Adaptive Cruise Control, Anti-Lock Brakes, and Selec-Speed Control
- Black 3-Piece Hard Top with Freedom Panel Storage Bag
- Corning Gorilla Glass
- Full Speed Forward Collision Warning Plus
- Enhanced Adaptive Cruise Control
- Power Heated Mirrors
- Security Alarm
- Premium Wrapped Steering Wheel
- Sun Visors with Illuminated Vanity Mirrors

The interior of this Wrangler Sport S is designed with your comfort and convenience in mind. Enjoy the premium wrapped steering wheel, the intuitive Uconnect 5 infotainment system with a 12.3-inch display, and the advanced safety features like Forward Collision Warning Plus and Enhanced Adaptive Cruise Control.

When it comes to versatility, the Wrangler Sport S delivers. With its split-folding rear seat and freedom panel storage bag, you can easily adapt the interior to accommodate your gear, whether you're headed to the beach, the trail, or the campsite.

Fuel efficiency is also a key consideration, and this Wrangler Sport S delivers with an EPA-estimated 20 mpg in the city and 22 mpg on the highway. That means you can spend more time exploring and less time at the pump.

If you're in the market for a rugged, capable, and stylish off-road vehicle, the 2024 Jeep Wrangler Sport S is the perfect choice. Visit our showroom today to experience this impressive SUV for yourself and let us help you discover the true power of adventure.

Discover the perfect blend of power, capability, and style with this 2017 Toyota 4Runner SR5. This rugged and versatile SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience and take you on unforgettable adventures.

4.0L V6 SMPI DOHC engine with 5-Speed Automatic Transmission and 4WD
17 MPG city / 20 MPG highway fuel efficiency
Impressive features including 8 Speakers, Entune Audio Plus, Power Driver Seat, and Steering Wheel Mounted Audio Controls
Trusted safety technologies like ABS Brakes, Dual Front Impact Airbags, and Electronic Stability Control

The 4Runner's bold, distinctive styling commands attention on the road. Its sleek black exterior exudes a sense of confidence and sophistication, while the roof rails and spoiler add a touch of rugged flair. Step inside and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed cabin that seamlessly blends comfort and convenience.

Versatility is at the heart of the 4Runner. The 50/50 split fold-flat third-row seating and ample cargo space allow you to easily adapt to your needs, whether you're transporting the whole family or tackling your next outdoor adventure. The available four-wheel drive system ensures you can conquer any terrain with confidence, while features like the Rear Camera and Traction Control keep you in control.

Safety is a top priority in the 4Runner, with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety technologies to give you peace of mind on the road. Dual front airbags, side-impact airbags, and an emergency communication system work together to protect you and your loved ones.

Experience the exceptional blend of power, capability, and style that the 2017 Toyota 4Runner SR5 has to offer. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this remarkable SUV can enhance your driving experience. We're confident you'll be impressed by its impressive features and uncompromising performance.

The 2018 Ram 1500 Tradesman 4WD Crew Cab in Bright White Clearcoat is a strong, dependable full-size pickup built to handle tough jobs while keeping you comfortable on the road. With its bold stance, clean Bright White exterior, and black interior, this truck delivers a classic, hardworking look that fits perfectly on the jobsite or in the driveway. The Crew Cab configuration provides generous interior space, giving both front and rear passengers plenty of room to stretch out without sacrificing bed utility.

Equipped with 4WD, this Ram 1500 is ready to tackle changing road conditions, rough terrain, and demanding workloads with confidence. Whether you're hauling equipment, towing a trailer, or navigating Missouri back roads, this truck is engineered to deliver the capability and durability Ram is known for. Its solid frame and composed ride quality make it just as comfortable on the highway as it is on gravel or dirt.

Inside, the cabin is designed with practicality in mind. The spacious Crew Cab layout offers ample legroom for passengers, making it ideal for work crews or families who need extra space. The black interior is both durable and easy to maintain, standing up well to daily wear and tear. Controls are straightforward and within easy reach, allowing you to focus on the task at hand while enjoying a comfortable driving experience.

The 2018 Ram 1500 Tradesman strikes an excellent balance between work-ready performance and everyday usability. Its a truck built to get the job done while still offering the comfort and space drivers expect from a modern pickup. Whether you need a reliable partner for your business or a capable truck for weekend projects and outdoor adventures, this Ram is ready to deliver.

At Joe Machens Volkswagen of Columbia, excellent customer service is always our number one priority. We proudly serve Columbia, Jefferson City, and all of Central Missouri, and we ship vehicles anywhere in the United States. Our inventory moves quickly due to high demand and competitive pricing. This 2019 BMW X3 sDrive30i in Jet Black captures the precise engineering and athletic character that define the BMW brand, blending luxury, technology, and performance in a well-balanced sport activity vehicle. Its Jet Black exterior enhances the sculpted body lines, signature kidney grille, and confident stance, giving it a sleek and purposeful appearance from every angle. The proportions are clean and athletic, with a profile that reflects both agility and sophistication.

Power comes from a 2.0-liter BMW TwinPower Turbo inline four-cylinder engine, engineered to produce strong acceleration with smooth, linear power delivery. Paired with an 8-speed Sport Automatic transmission, gear changes are crisp and well-timed, contributing to an engaging driving experience. The rear-wheel-drive configuration maintains the classic BMW driving dynamics enthusiasts appreciate, with balanced weight distribution and responsive steering that make cornering feel composed and controlled. The suspension tuning strikes an ideal balance between comfort and road feedback, making daily commuting and highway travel equally enjoyable.

Inside, the cabin reflects BMW s driver-focused design philosophy. High-quality materials, precise fit and finish, and an intuitive layout create an upscale environment. The supportive power-adjustable front seats are shaped for long-distance comfort, while the rear seating area provides generous legroom and versatility for passengers or cargo. Ambient lighting and carefully integrated trim elements enhance the interior s modern aesthetic.

Technology is seamlessly integrated through BMW s iDrive infotainment system, displayed on a centrally mounted high-resolution screen. Navigation, Bluetooth connectivity, Apple CarPlay compatibility, and voice command functionality are easily accessible through the rotary controller or touchscreen interface. A premium sound system fills the cabin with clear, immersive audio, and the digital instrument cluster provides real-time vehicle data in a clean, configurable layout.

Safety and driver assistance features further enhance confidence behind the wheel, including forward collision warning, automatic emergency braking, blind spot detection, lane departure warning, and a rearview camera. These systems work discreetly in the background to support awareness and control in a variety of driving scenarios.

This 2020 Chevrolet Colorado Work Truck is finished in classic Summit White and configured with rear-wheel drive, giving it a clean, purposeful appearance that aligns perfectly with its practical nature. The interior is straightforward and functional, designed with durability and ease of use in mind. Seating is comfortable and supportive, with hard-wearing materials chosen to handle regular use. The cabin layout places controls within easy reach, and the infotainment system includes a color touchscreen with Bluetooth connectivity, USB ports, and smartphone compatibility to keep communication and media simple and accessible. Air conditioning, power windows, and power door locks add everyday convenience, making this truck suitable for both workdays and daily errands.

On the road, the rear-wheel-drive setup provides a balanced driving feel and efficient operation, while the solid suspension tuning keeps the ride composed even when the bed is loaded. Safety features such as a rearview camera, stability control, traction control, and multiple airbags add reassurance behind the wheel. With its dependable V6 power, practical design, and proven Chevrolet engineering, this 2020 Colorado Work Truck is a capable and reliable choice for drivers seeking a midsize pickup that handles real-world demands with ease.

description:
Discover the exceptional 2021 Subaru Ascent Limited, a versatile and well-equipped SUV that can elevate your driving experience. With its impressive capabilities, advanced technology, and luxurious amenities, this Ascent is the perfect companion for your adventures.

Tailored to your needs, this Ascent Limited comes equipped with a host of premium features, including:
- Technology Package with Subaru STARLINK 8.0" Multimedia Navigation System, Dual Glass Panoramic Power Moonroof, and premium harman/kardon audio system
- Rear Bumper Cover, 3rd Row Bench Rear Seatback Protector, and All-Weather Floor Liners for enhanced protection and convenience
- Perforated Leather-Trimmed Upholstery, Heated Front Bucket Seats, and Heated Rear Seats for unparalleled comfort

Designed with your safety in mind, the Ascent Limited boasts a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Eyesight Driver Assist Technology, Blind-Spot Detection, and Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, keeping you and your loved ones secure on the road.

Versatility is at the heart of the Ascent, with seating for up to eight passengers and ample cargo space to accommodate all your needs. The 60/40-split fold-flat second-row seats and reclining third-row bench provide exceptional flexibility, while the Cargo Area Cover and All-Weather Floor Liners ensure your belongings remain protected.

Experience the perfect blend of capability, comfort, and technology in the 2021 Subaru Ascent Limited. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this exceptional SUV can enhance your driving life. We're confident you'll be impressed by its impressive features and exceptional value.

description:
The 2022 Honda Civic Sedan Sport CVT is a striking blend of style, performance, and cutting-edge technology, tailored for those seeking a modern driving experience. Cloaked in a sleek Sonic Gray Pearl exterior, this sedan exudes a sense of elegance and sophistication that demands attention on the road. The black interior further complements the exterior, providing a bold and stylish contrast that enhances the overall aesthetic appeal while offering a comfortable and inviting cabin atmosphere.

Under the hood, the Civic Sedan Sport CVT houses a robust 2.0L 4-cylinder engine, delivering a seamless balance of power and efficiency. This engine configuration ensures responsive acceleration and impressive fuel economy, making it ideal for both city commutes and long highway drives. The continuously variable transmission (CVT) enhances the vehicle's performance by providing smooth and effortless shifting, contributing to a refined driving experience. The Sport styling of this model also incorporates eye-catching features, such as sporty wheels and a rear spoiler, adding a dynamic edge to its appearance.

Inside, the 2022 Civic Sedan Sport is equipped with advanced technology and comfort features designed to elevate every journey. The infotainment system, paired with a user-friendly interface, ensures connectivity and entertainment at your fingertips. Furthermore, the ergonomically designed seats offer superior support, making long drives enjoyable and less fatiguing. Rounding out its appealing package, the Civic includes safety features that provide peace of mind, such as adaptive cruise control and collision mitigation braking, ensuring that every drive is both exhilarating and secure.

description: This Certified 2022 Honda Accord Sport, has a Platinum White Pearl exterior and an Black interior color. 28,201 miles. Stock Number 55643A. You can connect with us by calling  . No Accidents! One Owner! Important Package and Feature Information Safety and Security Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Now a 33-year Honda veteran, Clark Knapp Honda is proud to offer friendly service in a beautiful, modern building. Our updated modern facility puts drivers and their families first.

Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back! description:
Discover the Pinnacle of Sophistication and Performance in the 2024 Nissan Altima 2.5 SR. This exceptional sedan seamlessly blends style, technology, and driving dynamics to deliver an unparalleled ownership experience.

Meticulously equipped with a suite of premium features, the Altima 2.5 SR is designed to elevate your daily commute and weekend adventures. Highlights include:

Heated Front Seats
NissanConnect with 12.3 HD Display
Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto
Nissan Door-to-Door Navigation
Wireless Phone Charging
4-Way Power Passenger Seat
Single Panel Moonroof
2-Way Driver Power Lumbar Support
Premium Sport Interior Finishers
Carbon Fiber-Look Trim

The sport-tuned suspension and 19 alloy wheels further enhance the Altima's agile handling, allowing you to navigate winding roads with confidence and precision.

Safety is paramount in the Altima 2.5 SR, which comes equipped with a suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Features like Blind Spot Warning, Rear Parking Sensors, and Automatic High Beam Headlights work together to provide you with added peace of mind on the road.

Step inside the Altima 2.5 SR and you'll be greeted by a modern, well-appointed cabin that exudes refinement. Leather-appointed seating, a premium Bose audio system, and thoughtful storage solutions create an environment that's both comfortable and convenient.

Whether you're commuting to the office, embarking on a road trip, or simply enjoying the daily drive, the 2024 Nissan Altima 2.5 SR is the epitome of sophistication and performance. We invite you to experience this remarkable sedan firsthand and discover how it can elevate your driving experience. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate why the Altima 2.5 SR should be your next vehicle.

description:
Discover the Epitome of Sophistication and Performance: The 2024 Mazda Mazda3 2.5 S Premium Package

Prepare to be captivated by the remarkable 2024 Mazda Mazda3 2.5 S Premium Package, a vehicle that seamlessly blends style, technology, and uncompromising driving dynamics. This stunning one-owner, low-mileage Mazda is the perfect companion for the discerning driver who demands the best.

. Remote Engine Start from Phone App
. Navigation System
. Multi Zone Climate Control
. Leather Seats
. Bluetooth, Hands-Free
. Back-up Camera, Aerial View Display System
. Apple CarPlay & Android Auto
. BLACK REAR BUMPER GUARD

Powered by the renowned SKYACTIV? 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine, this Mazda3 delivers an exhilarating driving experience with exceptional fuel efficiency. Paired with a smooth 6-Speed Manual transmission and Front-Wheel Drive, this vehicle offers the perfect balance of power and control.

Indulge in the unparalleled comfort and convenience of the Mazda3's premium features. The leather-wrapped steering wheel and shift knob provide a tactile and refined touch, while the Heads-Up Display and Mazda Connect Infotainment System keep you informed and connected on the road. The 12-speaker audio system and Apple CarPlay/Android Auto integration ensure your entertainment needs are seamlessly met.

Safety is paramount in the Mazda3, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. From the Rear-View Camera and Blind Spot Monitoring to the Electronic Stability Control and 4-Wheel Disc Brakes with ABS, you can drive with confidence and peace of mind.

Elevate your driving experience with the stunning 2024 Mazda Mazda3 2.5 S Premium Package. This exceptional vehicle combines the perfect blend of style, performance, and technology, making it the ultimate choice for the discerning automotive enthusiast. Visit our showroom today and discover the true essence of driving pleasure.

description:
Discover the perfect blend of style, technology, and performance in the 2024 Chevrolet Trax LT. This stunning compact SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience with its impressive array of features and capabilities.

- CARFAX 1 Owner
- Clean Carfax
- Nice Local Trade-In
- Driver Confidence Package
- LT Convenience Package
- Preferred Equipment Group 1LT
- Air Conditioning
- Automatic Temperature Control
- Power Windows
- Steering Wheel Mounted Audio Controls
- Wrapped Steering Wheel
- Keyless Open
- Rear Park Assist
- Adaptive Cruise Control
- Heated Power-Adjustable Outside Mirrors
- Heated Steering Wheel
- Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert
- Rear Cross-Traffic Alert
- Heated Driver & Front Passenger Seats

Under the hood, the Trax LT boasts a 1.2L Ecotec Turbo DOHC DI engine with VVT, delivering an impressive balance of power and efficiency. With an EPA-estimated 28 city/32 highway MPG, you'll enjoy the freedom to explore without constantly stopping for fuel.

The exterior of the Trax LT exudes a confident and modern presence, with its sleek lines and striking Blue paint. The 17-inch Gray-Painted Machined Aluminum wheels add a touch of sophistication, while the rear window wiper and variable intermittent wipers ensure clear visibility in any weather.

Step inside the Trax LT and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior that caters to your every need. The Cloth/Evotex Seat Trim provides both comfort and style, while the 6-Way Manual Driver Seat Adjuster and 4-Way Manual Front Passenger Seat Adjuster allow you to find your perfect driving position. The Front Bucket Seats and Front Center Armrest add to the overall comfort, and the Split Folding Rear Seat provides versatility for your cargo needs.

The Chevrolet Infotainment 3 system with AM/FM radio and SiriusXM keeps you connected and entertained on the go. The 6-Speaker Audio System delivers a premium listening experience, while the Rear Window Defroster and Tilt/Telescoping Steering Wheel add to the convenience.

Safety is a top priority in the Trax LT, with features like Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, Overhead Airbag, and Occupant Sensing Airbag. The 4-Wheel Disc Brakes with ABS, Electronic Stability Control, and Traction Control ensure confident handling and control.

Experience the perfect balance of style, technology, and performance in the 2024 Chevrolet Trax LT. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this exceptional SUV can enhance your driving experience.

description:
The 2017 Dodge Durango SXT in DB Black Crystal Clearcoat is a versatile and powerful 4D SUV that combines spaciousness, capability, and modern comfort. With its bold black exterior and black interior, this Durango offers a commanding presence on the road while providing a flexible cabin layout ideal for families or anyone needing extra space. The all-wheel-drive system paired with a 3.45 rear axle ratio and four-wheel independent suspension ensures confident handling in all conditions, from city streets to weekend adventures.

Inside, the Durango SXT is designed to accommodate up to seven passengers with 3rd-row seating and 2nd-row 60/40 fold-and-tumble seats. Front dual-zone automatic climate control, heated door mirrors, and power-adjustable driver and passenger seats enhance comfort for all occupants. Integrated roof rail crossbars, bright side roof rails, and the 3rd-row seating group add both utility and versatility for carrying cargo, sports gear, or luggage.

Technology and connectivity are well integrated with Bluetooth, Uconnect 3 with 5-inch display, steering wheel mounted audio controls, and integrated voice command, keeping you connected and entertained while driving. Safety features include dual front and side airbags, anti-whiplash head restraints, traction control, rear window defroster, and remote keyless entry, providing confidence and peace of mind on every journey.

With its combination of capability, space, and technology, the 2017 Dodge Durango SXT is a strong choice for anyone seeking a reliable, family-friendly SUV with modern features.

description:
The 2017 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 WT in Summit White is a rugged and capable 2D Standard Cab pickup designed for both work and everyday driving. Its bold Summit White exterior paired with a Dark Ash interior with Jet Black accents gives it a clean, professional look, while the rear-wheel-drive system and 3.23 rear axle ratio provide reliable performance and handling under a variety of conditions. Built with a heavy-duty suspension, integrated trailer brake controller, and trailering package, this Silverado is ready to tackle towing, hauling, and demanding jobs with confidence.

Inside, the Silverado WT offers practical comfort and convenience. Cloth seats with front center armrest, power steering, power windows with driver express up, and a tilt steering wheel make daily driving straightforward and functional. Air conditioning, overhead airbags, and deep-tinted glass add to occupant comfort and safety. The cabin is thoughtfully designed for efficiency, durability, and ease of use, perfect for long days on the job or weekend projects.

Technology and connectivity features include Bluetooth for phone, a 6-speaker audio system, AM/FM radio with 7-inch diagonal color touch screen, steering wheel mounted audio controls, and OnStar with 4G LTE, keeping you connected and entertained wherever your Silverado takes you. Safety features like ABS brakes, brake assist, electronic stability control, dual front and side impact airbags, high-intensity discharge headlights, and fully automatic headlights ensure confidence on every drive.

With its combination of capability, durability, and practical technology, the 2017 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 WT Summit White is an excellent choice for anyone needing a reliable, work-ready pickup.

Additionally, the spacious cabin and generous trunk space make it ideal for both daily commutes and weekend getaways. Overall, the Civic Sedan EX CVT is a testament to Honda s dedication to innovation and quality, making it a top choice for those seeking a reliable and stylish sedan.

Under the hood, this model is powered by a robust 2.0L 4-cylinder engine that delivers an impressive driving experience, effortlessly combining power with efficiency.

Inside, the Accord offers a refined Black interior that exudes sophistication, crafted from premium materials providing unmatched comfort for both driver and passengers. The spacious cabin is thoughtfully designed with an intuitive layout, ensuring everything you need is within reach. Advanced technology, including a premium audio system and a user-friendly infotainment display, elevates the driving experience, keeping you connected and entertained on every journey.

The EX-L trim level enhances this sedan with luxurious features such as leather-trimmed seats, a power-adjustable driver's seat with memory function, and a sunroof that invites in natural light for an airy feel. Safety is a top priority with a suite of Honda Sensing technologies, including adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, and collision mitigation braking. Whether it's a daily commute or a long road trip, the 2019 Honda Accord Sedan EX-L 2.0T Auto offers unparalleled comfort, style, and reliability, making it an ideal choice for those who desire both performance and sophistication.

description:
The 2021 Toyota RAV4 XLE FWD in the striking Blueprint exterior color offers a perfect blend of style and practicality, appealing to those who desire both aesthetics and performance. The bold and deep tones of the Blueprint finish highlight the sleek, aerodynamic lines of the vehicle, making a statement on the road. Complemented by the elegant Black interior, the RAV4 provides a cozy and luxurious atmosphere for both driver and passengers.

Under the hood, the RAV4 is powered by a 2.5L 4-cylinder engine that delivers an efficient and responsive driving experience, ideal for both urban commutes and longer journeys. The XLE FWD model is equipped with a convenience package that adds features like a power moonroof and a power liftgate, enhancing the ease and comfort of your driving experience. Additionally, the vehicle includes roof rack cross bars for those who need extra storage for their outdoor adventures, seamlessly combining versatility with modern design.

The all-weather liner package ensures that the interior remains protected against the elements, perfect for any seasonal changes. With blackout emblem overlays, the RAV4 boasts a sophisticated and sporty look that sets it apart from others on the road. As a vehicle that complies with 50 state emissions requirements, the RAV4 XLE FWD ensures environmentally responsible driving. Altogether, this model stands as a testament to Toyota's commitment to innovation and quality, offering drivers a reliable and stylish ride.

description: Why BUY from DeFouw Chevrolet? When you choose this Aurora Black Pearl 2024 Kia Forte LXS with 37,509 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service! No Accidents! One Owner! What this vehicle includes: LXS Technology Package ($500 value)Blind-Spot Collision-Avoidance AssistSafe Exit Warning (SEW)Heated Outside MirrorsRear Cross-Traffic Collision-Avoidance Assist Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring AURORA BLACK, BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, LXS TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE Come on in to DeFouw Chevrolet today at 320 Sagamore Pkwy. Finding a C5 Corvette with mileage this low is increasingly difficult, making this vehicle an ideal choice for collectors, weekend drivers, or anyone wanting a modern classic that continues to appreciate in enthusiast value. - Back Up Camera
- Bluetooth

The Accord EX-L boasts a powerful yet fuel-efficient 2.4L I4 DOHC i-VTEC 16V engine, delivering an impressive 27 city/36 highway MPG. This Honda's CVT transmission and front-wheel-drive configuration provide a smooth and responsive driving experience, while the four-wheel independent suspension and speed-sensing steering ensure confident handling on the road.
