Beyond its impressive list of features, the Accord EX-L also boasts a timeless design that will turn heads wherever you go. The sleek, aerodynamic exterior is complemented by 17-inch alloy wheels and body-color bumpers, giving the vehicle a refined and sophisticated appearance.

Whether you're commuting to work, running errands, or embarking on a road trip, this 2013 Honda Accord EX-L is the perfect companion. With its blend of performance, efficiency, and premium amenities, it's a vehicle that will exceed your expectations and provide years of reliable service.

We invite you to experience the Accord EX-L for yourself. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate the exceptional quality and value this Honda has to offer. We're confident you'll be impressed by its impressive capabilities and confident that it's the right choice for your next vehicle.

description: DeNooyer Chevrolet Value vehicles are held to these standards giving you the confidence in your purchase! Denooyer Value vehicles are sold as-is with the emphasis on keeping only the best in this price range. We wholesale 25-50 cars per month that do not meet our standards, so we try to keep only the best in this category. These are great vehicles that will need some mechanical attention down the road and are excellent for someone on a budget with a little mechanical know how!

description:
2010 Chevrolet Equinox LTZ
Overview

The 2010 Chevrolet Equinox LTZ is a midsize crossover SUV that offers comfortable seating, practical versatility, and a smooth everyday ride. As the top trim level for its model year, the LTZ adds premium styling touches and upgraded interior features, making it a solid choice for drivers looking for value and space in an affordable SUV.

Performance & MPG

This 2010 Equinox LTZ is powered by a 3.0L V6 engine producing 264 horsepower and 222 lb-ft of torque, paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission. It delivers confident acceleration and smooth highway performance while achieving an EPA-estimated 25 MPG highway / 17 MPG city.

Mileage

With 160,550 miles, this 2010 Chevrolet Equinox LTZ has been well driven and continues to offer dependable performance and everyday practicality at an affordable price point.

Why Buy This Vehicle

The 2010 Chevrolet Equinox LTZ stands out with its spacious interior, comfortable ride, and V6 performance. Its an excellent option for buyers seeking a budget-friendly SUV with solid versatility for commuting, errands, or small family use.

Fun Fact

The 2010 model year marked a major redesign for the Equinox, introducing improved interior space and a more refined overall driving experience compared to earlier generations.

McCarthy Blue Springs Hyundai Pre-Owned Certification

At McCarthy Blue Springs Hyundai, we've been serving the community for over 30 years, combining a personal, pleasant customer experience with world-class service and expertise. We strive to make your vehicle purchase great and your vehicle ownership experience excellent. That's why we created our own Pre-Owned Vehicle Certification Program!

Your McCarthy Blue Springs Hyundai Certified vehicle is backed by a 3 Month / 4,500 Mile Comprehensive Limited Warranty. This protection covers hundreds of critical components that make up your vehicle's powertrain, engine cooling system, and electrical systems. It is provided free with your purchase because we stand behind the quality of our McCarthy Blue Springs Hyundai Certified Pre-Owned Vehicles!

Vehicles over 6 years old and/or having more than 100,000 miles on the odometer will qualify for a 30-day & 1,000-mile Limited Powertrain Warranty. See dealer for exact coverage details.

Additional Benefits:

$250 Body Shop Credit
$100 Tire Credit
2 Free Oil Changes

description:
Discover the exceptional 2010 Acura TSX 2.4, a meticulously maintained and well-equipped vehicle that exemplifies Acura's commitment to performance, luxury, and innovation. With its sleek gray exterior and a host of premium features, this TSX is poised to deliver an unparalleled driving experience.

Beneath the hood, the 2.4L I4 DOHC 16V i-VTEC engine, paired with a 5-Speed Automatic transmission, provides a dynamic and responsive performance that will captivate you on every drive. The four-wheel independent suspension and speed-sensing steering further enhance the vehicle's handling and responsiveness, making it a joy to drive.

Whether you're commuting to the office, embarking on a road trip, or simply enjoying the thrill of the open road, this 2010 Acura TSX 2.4 is the perfect companion. Experience the exceptional craftsmanship, performance, and features that make this vehicle a standout in its class. Visit our showroom today to take this remarkable TSX for a test drive and discover the difference Acura quality can make.

description:
Selling my well loved '10 LS460 AWD. This Nov would mark 9 years I have daily driven this car and it was purchased with 129K on the clock. The car still runs and drives great and has been a superb vehicle for me over the almost past decade. I have personally never been in an accident with this car though its Carfax does show a few minor incidents prior to my ownership. The only noticeable damage is a small dent in the driver front fender, which I have shown a close up of. The car is in good shape for its age but please keep in mind; it is a 16 year old car with 220K on the clock.

Of note; the TPMS sensors recently went out (hence the low tire light in the running dash picture) and the driver seat heater quit about 2 years after I purchased the car (cooler still works). Everything else functions as it should (including the air ride suspension and as you can see; there are no other warning lights lit on the dash. Nothing is wrong with the center navigation touchscreen either, the black line is because of my camera but not actually present.

This is a well appointed car, having been optioned with the Cold Weather Package and Luxury Value Edition Package.

I have provided the VIN as well as the added options straight from the Lexus website for you to do your own research. Both the full Spec Sheet from Lexus and a current Carfax will be available from me in .PDF format, upon request.

Mileage will not change greatly as I have already replaced this car with another (I liked this car so much I purchased another, newer LS460). Fresh oil/filter change and tire rotation/balance performed by local shop less than 50 miles ago from the time of this posting, receipt and window sticker both present. Tires are somewhere between half to 1/3rd life left on them.

ABS (4-Wheel), Air Conditioning, AM/FM Stereo, CD/MP3 (Single Disc), Cruise Control, Dual Air Bags, Power Door Locks, Power Steering, Power Windows, Steel Wheels, Tilt Wheel, Towing Pkg, Traction Control

Efficient & Agile Performance

Visibility: Features an Exterior Parking Camera Rear and Front Fog Lights to help you navigate tight spots and low-light conditions.

Professional Finance Consultations
At Wildcat Chevrolet, we treat you like a neighbor. We understand that finding an affordable, reliable vehicle is a priority for many families.

Tailored Finance Solutions: For our budget-friendly pre-owned inventory, our team provides professional finance consultations. We work with a network of lenders to find a plan that respects your monthly budget and helps you move forward with confidence. Come see us in Cadiz we make the process simple and transparent!

Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedals travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Discover the exceptional 2017 Ford C-Max Energi Titanium, a hybrid vehicle that seamlessly blends efficiency, technology, and style. This captivating model offers a remarkable driving experience, combining the convenience of a compact car with the advanced features you desire.

Tailored to your needs, the C-Max Energi Titanium boasts an impressive array of premium amenities, including:
- Equipment Group 501A, featuring the Titanium Driver Assist Package, BLIS Blind Spot Information System, and Active Park Assist with Forward Sensing System
- Voice-Activated Touchscreen Navigation System with SiriusXM Traffic and Travel Link, providing real-time guidance and entertainment
- Hands-Free Liftgate and Power Liftgate for effortless cargo loading and unloading

Slip into the refined, leather-trimmed front bucket seats and experience the unparalleled comfort and style that define this Titanium model. The intuitive SYNC 3 infotainment system seamlessly integrates your smartphone, allowing you to stay connected on the go.

Beneath the sleek exterior, the C-Max Energi's I4 Hybrid powertrain delivers an exceptional blend of efficiency and performance. Enjoy the confidence of front-wheel drive and the responsiveness of the eCVT transmission, all while maximizing your fuel savings.

This well-equipped C-Max Energi Titanium also boasts a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Blind Spot Information System, Rear Parking Sensors, and a Rearview Camera, ensuring you navigate the road with peace of mind.

With its striking blue exterior and meticulously crafted interior, the 2017 Ford C-Max Energi Titanium is a testament to Ford's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction. Experience the perfect balance of efficiency, technology, and style schedule a test drive today and discover the C-Max Energi Titanium's exceptional capabilities.

Looking for a luxury SUV that knows how to treat your family like VIPs while still keeping its sensible Midwestern roots? Meet the **2017 Buick Enclave Leather Group**, available now at **McCarthy Subaru of Lawrence**where comfort, confidence, and class come standard (along with a dash of fun).

### Power, Poise, and Politeness
Under the hood, the Enclave features a **3.6-liter V6 engine** paired with a **6-speed automatic transmission**, delivering 288 horsepower that's smooth, quiet, and confident; like the strong, silent type. With its **all-wheel-drive system** (available on select trims) and **four-wheel independent suspension**, this SUV glides down highways, city streets, and country roads alike with grace and poise.

### A Cabin That Whispers Luxury
Slip inside, and you'll find three rows of premium comfort with **leather-appointed seating** and **heated front seats** that make winter commutes feel downright cozy. The **power-adjustable drivers seat with memory settings** ensures your throne is always at the perfect height, while **tri-zone automatic climate control** keeps every passenger perfectly content, whether they're warm-blooded or always freezing.

Buicks attention to quiet-tuning and soft-touch materials creates a serene ride, while the **Bose 10-speaker premium audio system** turns your favorite playlist into a live concert experience. The **Buick IntelliLink touchscreen** with **Bluetooth, SiriusXM, and smartphone integration** keeps you connected, entertained, and hands-free; because texting while steering a luxury SUV? Not classy.

### Safety That Never Takes a Day Off
The 2017 Enclave doesn't just pamper, it protects. It's loaded with advanced safety tech including **Side Blind Zone Alert**, **Rear Cross Traffic Alert**, **Rear Park Assist**, and a **Rear Vision Camera**. You'll also find **StabiliTrak Electronic Stability Control**, **Traction Control**, and a full suite of **airbags** to help keep your most precious cargo safe.

In fact, the Enclave earned high marks from the **IIHS** and **NHTSA**, proving that luxury and safety can share the same leather seat.

Learn more about how every pre-owned vehicle from our dealership meets meticulous standards through our **[McCarthy Certified Pre-Owned Program](https://www.mccarthysubaruoflaw rence.com/Why-McCarthy-Certified/)**your assurance of top quality, added protection, and unbeatable peace of mind.

### Features That Make Every Drive Feel First-Class
- Power liftgate for hands-free convenience
- Remote start for quick warmups or cool-downs
- Heated steering wheel
- Second-row captain's chairs for first-class comfort
- Third-row 60/40 split-fold bench for flexible cargo space
- Rear climate and audio controls (so backseat DJs can run their own show)
- HID headlights and LED running lights for a brighter, safer path ahead

And because were McCarthy Subaru of Lawrence, every vehicle you purchase comes with a **Free Warranty, Inspection Checklist, and more**because trust and transparency are our favorite features.

### Nationwide? No Problem.
Whether you're five minutes away or five states over, we can **sign and ship this 2017 Buick Enclave Leather Group anywhere in the United States**. Your dream SUV doesn't need to wait for you, it will come to your driveway, ready to roll.

Want to see how great your deal can get? Don't miss our **[latest Subaru specials near Kansas City](https://www.mccarthysubaruoflawren ce.com/subaru-specials-near-kansas-city/ )**because a luxury SUV is even sweeter when it comes with extra savings.

This 2017 Hyundai Elantra SE is a standout in its class, offering a winning combination of style, technology, and performance. With its sleek exterior design and well-appointed interior, this Elantra is sure to turn heads wherever you go.

Key features include:
- Google Android Auto
- Apple CarPlay®
- Bluetooth, Hands-Free connectivity
- Premium Audio
- Backup Camera
- Cruise Control
- Keyless Entry
- Push Button Start
- Power Locks
- Power Windows

The Elantra's 2.0L 4-Cylinder engine delivers an impressive 29 city / 38 highway MPG, ensuring you can enjoy the ride without breaking the bank at the pump. And with the 6-Speed Automatic Transmission with Shiftronic, you'll have the perfect balance of power and efficiency.

Step inside and you'll be greeted by a well-designed cabin that prioritizes both comfort and convenience. The premium cloth seats provide ample support, while the user-friendly infotainment system with a 7-inch display keeps you connected and entertained. Plus, with features like Cruise Control and Keyless Entry, the Elantra makes every drive a breeze.

Safety is also a top priority, with a suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies including a Backup Camera, Traction Control, and Electronic Stability Control. You can take to the road with confidence, knowing you and your passengers are well-protected.

Whether you're looking for a daily commuter or a versatile family vehicle, this 2017 Hyundai Elantra SE is an exceptional choice. With its compelling mix of style, technology, and performance, it's sure to exceed your expectations. We invite you to schedule a test drive and experience the Elantra's exceptional value for yourself.

Thank you for considering Shottenkirk Nissan Katy. We look forward to the opportunity to earn your business and help you find the perfect vehicle for your needs.

description:
THE 2011 DODGE AVENGER MAINSTREET 4DR SEDAN IS A COMFORTABLE AND PRACTICAL FAMILY-SIZED VEHICLE WITH A SMOOTH RIDE, USER-FRIENDLY FEATURES, AND A BALANCED PERFORMANCE PROFILE. POWERED BY A 2.4-LITER FOUR-CYLINDER ENGINE PAIRED WITH A FOUR-SPEED AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION, IT OFFERS A RELIABLE BLEND OF POWER AND FUEL EFFICIENCY FOR DAILY DRIVING, COMMUTES, AND HIGHWAY TRAVEL. THE FRONT-WHEEL-DRIVE PLATFORM PROVIDES PREDICTABLE HANDLING AND A COMPOSED RIDE QUALITY, MAKING IT A GOOD CHOICE FOR DRIVERS SEEKING EASY, STRESS-FREE OPERATION.

INSIDE, THE MAINSTREET TRIM OFFERS A WELL-APPOINTED CABIN WITH SEATING FOR FIVE OCCUPANTS AND COMFORTABLE SUPPORT THROUGHOUT. STANDARD FEATURES INCLUDE AIR CONDITIONING, POWER WINDOWS AND DOOR LOCKS, CRUISE CONTROL, AND A TILT STEERING WHEEL FOR ADJUSTABLE DRIVING COMFORT. THE INTERIOR MATERIALS ARE DURABLE AND PRACTICAL, WITH A SIMPLE AND FUNCTIONAL DASH LAYOUT. THE AUDIO SYSTEM OFFERS AM/FM/CD PLAYBACK AND AUXILIARY INPUTS FOR CONNECTION TO PERSONAL MEDIA DEVICES.

THE AVENGER ALSO PROVIDES A GENEROUS TRUNK WITH EASY ACCESS THROUGH ITS WIDE LID, MAKING GROCERIES, LUGGAGE, AND OTHER CARGO EASY TO LOAD AND STORE. SAFETY FEATURES INCLUDE ANTILOCK BRAKES, TRACTION CONTROL, AND MULTIPLE AIRBAGS TO HELP PROTECT OCCUPANTS. OVERALL, THE 2011 DODGE AVENGER MAINSTREET IS A SOLID, NO-NONSENSE SEDAN THAT OFFERS COMFORT, VALUE, AND DEPENDABLE DAILY PERFORMANCE FOR DRIVERS AND FAMILIES.

Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back! Sporting a sleek Crystal Black Pearl exterior and a comfortable black interior, this sedan offers a smooth ride with its 2.4-liter four-cylinder engine producing 190 horsepower. A sunroof adds a touch of luxury, inviting natural light into the cabin and enhancing your driving experience. This vehicle s timeless design is complemented by features that elevate comfort and convenience. The sunroof/moonroof allows you to enjoy fresh air and sunlight on pleasant drives, while its spacious four-door layout offers easy access for all passengers. The Accord s well-appointed black interior adds sophistication, and its automatic transmission makes city driving and highway cruising seamless. description:
THE 2013 BMW 3 SERIES 320I XDRIVE AWD 4DR SEDAN IS A PREMIUM COMPACT LUXURY CAR DESIGNED TO DELIVER PRECISE HANDLING, SOPHISTICATED STYLE, AND CONFIDENT ALL-WEATHER PERFORMANCE. ITS EXTERIOR SHOWCASES BMW'S ICONIC PROPORTIONS A LONG HOOD, SHORT OVERHANGS, AND A SLIGHTLY ATHLETIC STANCE ENHANCED BY THE XDRIVE ALL-WHEEL-DRIVE SYSTEM THAT ADDS TRACTION AND STABILITY IN RAIN, SNOW, OR DRY CONDITIONS. DISTINCTIVE DESIGN ELEMENTS LIKE THE KIDNEY GRILLE, SHARP HEADLAMPS, AND CLEAN BODY LINES GIVE IT A RESOLUTE, TIMELESS PRESENCE ON THE ROAD.

INSIDE, THE 320I XDRIVE OFFERS A WELL-CRAFTED CABIN WITH HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS, SUPPORTIVE SEATING, AND A DRIVER-CENTRIC COCKPIT. THE INTERIOR BALANCES LUXURY AND FUNCTIONALITY, WITH ERGONOMIC CONTROLS, PREMIUM UPHOLSTERY, AND INTUITIVE FEATURES DESIGNED TO ENHANCE EVERY DRIVE. COMFORTABLE SEATING ACCOMMODATES BOTH DRIVER AND PASSENGERS GENEROUSLY, WHILE AMPLE CARGO SPACE IN THE TRUNK PROVIDES PRACTICAL UTILITY FOR DAILY USE OR TRIPS.

POWERED BY A SMOOTH AND EFFICIENT FOUR-CYLINDER ENGINE PAIRED WITH A RESPONSIVE AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION, THE 320I DELIVERS BALANCED PERFORMANCE WITH RESPECTABLE FUEL ECONOMY. HANDLING REMAINS PRECISE AND ENGAGING, WITH XDRIVE ADDING CONFIDENCE IN CHALLENGING ROAD CONDITIONS. THE RIDE STRIKES A BALANCE BETWEEN SPORTINESS AND COMFORT, ABSORBING BUMPS WHILE MAINTAINING AGILITY IN CORNERS. STANDARD SAFETY FEATURES INCLUDE MULTIPLE AIRBAGS, ANTI-LOCK BRAKES, STABILITY CONTROL, AND AVAILABLE DRIVER ASSISTANCE OPTIONS, PROVIDING PEACE OF MIND. OVERALL, THE 2013 BMW 3 SERIES 320I XDRIVE AWD 4DR SEDAN IS A REFINED, VERSATILE LUXURY VEHICLE THAT OFFERS A REWARDING BLEND OF DYNAMICS, COMFORT, AND EVERYDAY USABILITY.

2024 Chevrolet Tahoe Premier - Summit White

Command every journey in this 2024 Chevrolet Tahoe Premier finished in stunning Summit White - a full-size SUV that blends power, luxury, and family-ready versatility. Powered by a potent 6.2L V8 and equipped with 4WD, this Tahoe is ready for all weather conditions and every adventure, from daily drives to long highway cruises.

Step inside its refined interior and experience premium comfort for every passenger. Enjoy heated and cooled front seats, heated second-row seating, and spacious 3rd-row seating perfect for big families or groups. The BOSE Premium Audio system delivers rich, immersive sound, while backup cameras provide confidence and safety when maneuvering or parking.

Convenience features like a power liftgate make loading cargo effortless, and thoughtful design ensures there's ample space for passengers and gear alike. With a clean Carfax, you can feel confident in this Tahoe Premiers well-maintained history.

Comfortable, capable, and full-featured this Tahoe Premier is the ideal SUV for families who want strength and refinement in one impressive package.

Proudly serving DFW, McKinney, Allen, Plano, Frisco, and all of North Texas.

<p>Experience the Pinnacle of Luxury and Performance with the 2025 Lincoln Navigator Reserve in Infinite Black Metallic Clearcoat</p>
<p>Step into the world of opulence and power with the 2025 Lincoln Navigator Reserve, a used masterpiece designed for those who appreciate the finer things in life. This SUV, finished in a striking Infinite Black Metallic Clearcoat, combines elegance with the robust performance of a 3.5L V6 twin-turbocharged engine. With its 10-speed automatic transmission and 4x4 drivetrain, the Navigator ensures a smooth and commanding drive, whether you’re cruising city streets or exploring rugged terrain.</p>
<p>Inside, the Navigator pampers you with leather seats that offer both heating and cooling options, alongside a seat-massage feature for ultimate comfort. The panoramic roof floods the cabin with natural light, enhancing the spacious feel, while the power retractable running boards provide effortless entry and exit. Advanced safety features like Blind Spot Monitor, Lane Keeping Assist, and Rear Collision Mitigation keep you secure on every journey.</p>
<p>Stay connected with the state-of-the-art navigation system and enjoy your favorite tunes through the premium sound system, all seamlessly integrated with smart device technology. The hands-free liftgate and adaptive cruise control add convenience to your travels, making the 2025 Lincoln Navigator Reserve not just a vehicle, but a lifestyle statement.</p>
<p>Be sure to call or visit Toyota of Dallas to discover more. Your new favorite vehicle awaits - don't let someone else drive it home!</p>?

description:
Discover the ultimate heavy-duty pickup with the 2024 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD ZR2. This exceptional vehicle combines uncompromising capability, advanced technology, and exceptional comfort, making it the ideal choice for those who demand the very best.

Equipped with a powerful Duramax 6.6L V8 Turbodiesel engine, the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 delivers an impressive 470 horsepower and an astounding 975 lb-ft of torque, ensuring you have the power to conquer any challenge. Paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission and a robust 4WD system, this truck is ready to take on the toughest terrain and the heaviest of loads.

- Off-Road High Clearance Steps (LPO)
- Sunroof, Power
- Tailgate, Multi-Flex with six functional load/access features
- Alternator, 220 Amps
- Engine Block Heater
- Technology Package with Rear Camera Mirror and Multicolor 15 Diagonal Head-Up Display

The Silverado 2500HD ZR2 is packed with innovative features that enhance your driving experience. The Rear Camera Mirror provides a clear, unobstructed view behind the vehicle, while the Multicolor Head-Up Display projects vital information directly in your line of sight, keeping you informed without taking your eyes off the road.

Comfort and convenience are paramount in this truck, with features like heated and ventilated front seats, a heated steering wheel, and dual-zone automatic climate control. The spacious cabin offers ample room for both passengers and cargo, ensuring that every journey is a pleasure.

Designed with off-road capability in mind, the Silverado 2500HD ZR2 is equipped with a specialized suspension system and rugged off-road tires, allowing you to conquer even the most challenging terrain with confidence. The Durabed pickup bed provides ample space for all your hauling needs, with a tailgate that offers six functional load/access features for added versatility.

Safety is also a top priority, with a host of advanced driver-assistance technologies, including Adaptive Cruise Control, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, and Hitch Guidance with Hitch View, ensuring you can navigate the road with peace of mind.

Experience the unparalleled power, capability, and comfort of the 2024 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD ZR2. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate why this exceptional truck is the ultimate choice for those who demand the very best.

description:
The 2023 70th Anniversary Corvette Stingray is a premier, collector-grade vehicle, distinguished by unique White Pearl and Carbon Flash Metallic paint, 70th badging, red stitching, and edge-red calipers. This limited run vehicle is equipped with 3LT trim, it includes specialized two-tone Ceramic Red leather seats and a suede microfiber steering wheel. Stingray 3LT coupe and convertible, equipped with the 6.2L V8 engine capable of 0-60 mph in 2.9 seconds. According to Vin reveals, General Motors Bowling Green assembly plant in Kentucky has rolled out only 840 70th anniversary edition Corvettes. Another 14 Z06s have also rolled out from the plant, making it a total of 852 vehicles. Every 2023 has a commemorative 70th anniversary logo/sticker on the rear window but they are not 70th anniversary edition cars. 70th anniversary edition cars only came in Carbon Flash & Pearl White, they also have a specific interior only available on a 70th edition
This vehicle is true supercar performance and status....
